boolean.name: computeDistanceWithWebService
boolean.help: When this option is enabled, for kilometric expenses, the number of kilometers between the departure and arrival addresses is automatically calculated using a web service connecting to Google Maps or Open Street Map. These web services are configured in the Base application settings, in the Interface tab. Note that with Google Maps, API fees may apply after a certain number of requests.

boolean.name: isOrphanExpenseLineManaged
boolean.title: Manage orphan expense lines
boolean.help: This configuration allows to fill expense lines before creating any expense. This process is similar to the mobile application one.

boolean.name: enableExpenseDeclaration
boolean.title: Enable expense declaration
boolean.help: Allows external employees to declare expenses. Unlike expenses, these declarations do not generate an accounting entry but can be validated before being re-invoiced on a project. External employee costs are reimbursed as part of the payment of a supplier invoice.
